overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in red robes walking along a coastal dirt path at night. The character passes stone walls, wooden fences, and a lantern post while approaching a distant settlement with lights visible on the horizon.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a coastal dirt path at night, with a stone wall and water on the left and grassy hills on the right. The character approaches and passes a glowing lantern post that illuminates the path ahead.

segments.scene_description: The path continues past the lantern, with wooden fences and stone retaining walls appearing on the right. Distant building lights become visible on the horizon as the character progresses along the coastal trail.

events.description: path curves slightly revealing more open water view and distant campfire light

agents.ego_description: walking toward the distant lights of a settlement or campsite visible ahead

entered.detail: multiple light sources from buildings or campfires on the distant shore
clusters of white wildflowers growing beside the path
bright orange light source suggesting a fire or lamp in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final stretch of the path reveals more of the coastal water on the left and colorful wildflowers on the right. The character approaches distant lights from a settlement or campsite, with the path curving gently toward the illuminated horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a nocturnal coastal path that gradually leads toward the warm glow of a distant settlement. It begins with a character in red robes walking between a stone wall and grassy hills, passing a glowing lantern post that casts a pool of light across the dirt trail. As the character moves beyond the lantern, the environment shifts to include wooden fences and stone retaining walls on the right while the first faint lights of a village appear on the horizon. The scene then opens up to reveal more of the dark coastal water on the left and colorful wildflowers on the right, before the path curves gently toward the increasingly bright, illuminated settlement ahead.
